key_points: The story is written by Guy de Maupassant
Mme Loisel is the central character of the story
She is dissatisfied with her simple life
The necklace plays a crucial role in the story
The story highlights appearance versus reality
characters: Mme Loisel – A proud and dissatisfied woman
Mr Loisel – A patient and supportive husband
literary_devices: Irony – The necklace turns out to be fake
Realism – Ordinary people and real-life situations
exam_tips: Remember the main theme: appearance versus reality
Focus on the irony in the ending
Learn character traits of Mme Loisel and Mr Loisel
Mention the moral clearly in answers
